calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JERRY WANG, Esq. of Gaba Guerrini Law Corporation (Tel: 888-391-1228) for plaintiff/judgment creditor Wine Warehouse;
Defendant/judgment debtor DANIEL FLORES in pro per.

FURTHER HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WINE WAREHOUSE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DETERMINING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant/judgment debtor Daniel Flores' claim of exemption is denied. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment creditor.

The Court signs a formal order and mail copies to the parties and the Los Angeles County Shjeriff's Office.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID BRAND, Esq. of Gaba Guerrini Law Corporation (Tel: 888-391-1228) for plaintiff/judgment creditor Wine Warehouse;
Defendant/judgment debtor DANIEL FLORES.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WINE WAREHOUSE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DETERMINING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues the matter for further hearing to July 26, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Parties are instructed to confer as to a potential resolution/payment plan.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
